raw:
## Completed
Implemented generic Foreman gate pipeline engine with legacy `verifyCommand` compatibility and per-round command gate execution.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/gates.ts` - new pure gate model/loader/selectors/command runner.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - loads gates once, runs per-round command gates, reports gate failures to developer, updates plan text, adds pre-ship TODO.
- `extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh` - headless unit coverage for loading, fallback, malformed config, selectors, and command runner.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh`

## Notes
Verified successfully with the command above. `runCommandGates` deliberately runs all matching command gates in order to collect diagnostics.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)

  ],
  "howToVerify": "bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh"
